delete_account.section_description: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data

permissions.invite_placeholder: Email address or group, separated by commas

share.title: Share
share.current_file_only_tooltip:
When enabled, only shares the current file.
When disabled, shares with all sub-files.
share.require_login_tooltip:
When enabled, users must log in to view this shared resource.
When disabled, users can view this shared resource without logging in.

shared_resources.password_required: Password is required to view this resource.

trash.title: Trash
trash.auto_delete_notice: Resources in trash older than {{days}} days will be automatically deleted

confirm.single_description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this resource? Once deleted, it cannot be undone.
confirm.clear_description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all resources in the trash? This action cannot be undone.

batch.delete_description: You can restore them from trash. They will be automatically deleted after {{days}} days.
batch.delete_smart_folder_description: Moving smart folders to trash will not affect their internal resources. You can restore them from trash, and they will be automatically deleted after {{days}} days.
batch.delete_mixed_description: You can restore them from trash. They will be automatically deleted after {{days}} days. (Moving smart folders to trash will not affect their internal resources.)
batch.delete_partial_error: Successfully moved {{success}} resources to trash. {{failed}} resources were not authorized
batch.move_partial_error: Successfully moved {{success}} resources. {{failed}} were not authorized
batch.move_name_conflict_failed: The selected resources were not moved because resources with the same name already exist. Batch operation failed
batch.move_name_conflict_partial: Successfully moved {{success}} resources. {{failed}} were not moved because resources with the same name already exist
batch.move_target_readonly: The target location is view-only. Resources cannot be moved there
batch.create_success: Folder created. Selected resources were moved automatically
batch.create_partial_success: Folder created. {{success}} resources were moved, and {{fail}} were not authorized
batch.create_target_readonly: The target location is view-only. Folders cannot be created there
batch.create_name_conflict: A resource with the same name already exists in the current directory
batch.smart_folder_unsupported_action: Smart folders do not support this operation.
batch.smart_folder_child_unselectable: Smart folder child items cannot be selected
batch.all_forbidden: None of the selected resources are authorized. Batch operation failed
batch.operating_resource: You are batch operating this resource

create.description: Resources matching these conditions will appear in the smart folder automatically.

create.personal_quota_exhausted: Personal quota has been used up. Upgrade to create without limits.
create.team_quota_exhausted: Team quota has been used up. Upgrade to create without limits.
create.quota_exhausted: Quota is exhausted. Upgrade for unlimited creation.
create.all_quota_exhausted: All quotas are exhausted. Upgrade for unlimited creation.
create.unsaved_title: Your smart folder configuration is not saved. Exit anyway?

validation.name_required: Please enter a smart folder name

smart_folder.empty: No matching resources yet. You can edit the filter rules.
